name: Shrimp Remoulade
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the shrimp until they turn pink and are just cooked through. Drain.
2. Whisk together mustard, vinegar, parsley, paprika, and garlic in a bowl.
3. Gradually whisk in olive oil in a thin stream.
4. Add horseradish and hot pepper sauce to taste.
5. Fold in the celery, scallions, and reserved shrimp until well coated.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 3 hours, up to 24 hours.
7. Serve cold on lettuce or at room temperature.
